title: Legal Research Memo
description: Structured legal research memo produced by the Research agent. All citations must be verified.

question.description: The precise legal question being researched (one question per memo)

applicable_statutes.description: Statutes and specific sections relevant to the question

relevance.description: How this provision applies to the question

applicable_regulations.description: SEBI/RBI/other regulations relevant to the question

case_law.description: Relevant case law with citations and principles

citation.description: Full citation in Indian legal format

principle.description: Specific legal principle established or applied

relevance.description: How this case applies to the research question

binding_or_persuasive.description: Precedential value relative to the matter's jurisdiction

analysis.description: Detailed legal analysis applying law to the question. Must include all citations inline.

conclusion.description: Direct, concise answer to the research question

alternative_views.description: Counter-arguments, minority views, or alternative interpretations that a court might adopt

practical_recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations for the matter (not legal advice — for advocate review)

open_issues.description: Legal questions that remain unresolved or require further investigation

confidence.description: Confidence in the legal analysis. Low confidence triggers HITL.

disclaimer.default: This memo is generated by AI and is for informational purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice. All citations must be independently verified by a qualified advocate before reliance.
